title: Subitems won't show up in Dynamic View
excerpt: Hi there! My team is using ‘me (dynamic view)’ to see which tasks they are assigned too. However, I noticed that if you are only assigned to a subitem, you don’t get to see that item in dynamic view. Does anyone know how…

posts.author: Yorick020 (Yorick)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi there! My team is using ‘me (dynamic view)’ to see which tasks they are assigned too. However, I noticed that if you are only assigned to a subitem, you don’t get to see that item in dynamic view. Does anyone know how to fix this?
